_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including their mathematical foundations, hyperparameter behavior, and appropriate application conditions.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-006 (TF, cosine: 0.536), AI-K-019 (AI, cosine: 0.502).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.622). Shared vocabulary: [algorithms, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [computer] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations, hyperparameter] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.961, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.103 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of computer algorithms." and "Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.587 ≈ STS 0.622 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [algorithms, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [algorithms, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [computer]. WIDAI-only: [application, appropriate, behavior, conditions, foundations, hyperparameter].
